PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 7/25/2005 TO PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY.
